projects.name: Guest Relations
projects.description: Delivering warm, professional service for international guests in luxury hotel and restaurant settings—handling requests, resolving issues, and creating memorable stays.

projects.name: Event Coordination
projects.description: Supporting large-scale events and rooftop hospitality operations—coordinating teams, timelines, and service delivery under high standards.

projects.name: Operations Management
projects.description: Maintaining operational excellence in fast-paced environments—staff coordination, quality control, and problem-solving when standards matter most.
